creator: jglossinger@gmail.com
text:
Both mod_php80 and mod_php82 ( I assume mod_php81 as well, though I did not test that) hang on any pkg operation (e.g. they hang during pkg install/delete/upgrade). The process that hangs is a perl script which consumes 100% of cpu and never finishes.

The workaround is to simply kill the perl process. This allows pkg to finish whatever operation was hung. I don't know what the perl script is, or what it is trying to accomplish, but there seem to be no ill effects from simply killing it.
